form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 10 at this track on April 4 over 1710m, 8 len behind D Dolly's Girl with 54kg at $22.80. The start before that second last in a small field at Tampa Bay Downs on February 6 over 1646m, 33 len behind Always A Runner carrying 54kg at $51.10. Better than that recent plain performance suggests.

form.formComment: Resuming after a seven months break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 8 at Presque Isle Downs September 15 over 1207m, 15 len behind Sister Hustle carrying 54.5kg at $37.30. On debut second last of 7 at Presque Isle Downs August 6 over 1106m, 15 len behind Blazing Brat carrying 54.5kg at $20.60. Marginal prospect.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 11 at this track on April 1 over 1710m, 2.75 len behind British Empress with 55kg at $23.60. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at Tampa Bay Downs on March 8 over 1646m, 6 len behind Stormey Monday carrying 55kg at $11.30. Draws a nice alley and rates highly.
